metadata.description: Complete D1 target schools with XGBoost scores, engineering, rosters, international swimmers

physical_profile.notes: Elite height for sprint freestyle. Room to lean out 5 lbs while adding muscle.

advantages: Smaller competition pool for Israeli team
Lower Olympic qualifying standards vs USA
Proven NCAA → Israel pipeline (Kartavi, Murez, Gerchik)

requirements: No competition Friday sunset to Saturday havdalah

metadata.purpose: Compare Michael Shapira's physique to elite sprint swimmers

elite_sprinters.name: Kyle Chalmers
elite_sprinters.michael_match: EXCELLENT - Same height, similar build. Best comparison for Michael.
elite_sprinters.training_notes: Power-based sprinter, excels at underwater work

elite_sprinters.name: Michael Andrew
elite_sprinters.michael_match: EXCELLENT - Similar height/weight. BOTH USE KETO DIET. Same sprint focus.
elite_sprinters.diet: Ketogenic - strict keto during training, flexible competition
elite_sprinters.training_notes: USRPT (Ultra Short Race Pace Training), father-coached

elite_sprinters.name: Nathan Adrian
elite_sprinters.michael_match: GOOD - 2 inches taller but similar power build. At 6'4", Michael should be 210-215 lbs (lighter than Adrian).
elite_sprinters.training_notes: Cal Berkeley trained, high volume with sprint focus

elite_sprinters.name: Caeleb Dressel
elite_sprinters.michael_match: VERY GOOD - 1 inch shorter but same build type. UF model for Michael.
elite_sprinters.training_notes: UF trained under Nesty, power + technique combination

elite_sprinters.name: Matt Grevers
elite_sprinters.michael_match: REFERENCE - Shows tall swimmers can be elite backstrokers too. Michael at 6'4" should be ~15 lbs lighter.

elite_sprinters.name: Josh Liendo
elite_sprinters.michael_match: GOOD - Same school target (UF). Michael is taller/heavier but same coach (Nesty).
elite_sprinters.training_notes: UF current swimmer, Canadian Olympic team

michael_optimal_profile.rationale: At 6'4", elite sprint weight is 200-215 lbs. Michael should lean out ~5 lbs while maintaining muscle mass. Chalmers and Andrew are closest comparisons.
michael_optimal_profile.development_path: Lose 5 lbs fat, add 3-5 lbs muscle = net -2 to 0 lbs, but significantly leaner

key_insights: Kyle Chalmers at 6'3"-6'4" and 200 lbs is the BEST model for Michael
Michael Andrew uses KETO DIET - directly applicable for kosher adaptation
At 6'4", optimal sprint weight is 200-215 lbs (Michael is at upper range)
Taller sprinters (6'4"+) benefit from longer underwater dolphin kicks
Power-to-weight ratio matters more than raw weight
All elite tall sprinters have excellent underwaters and streamlines

metadata.purpose: Michael Andrew-style keto diet adapted for kosher observance

monday_thursday.name: Strict Keto Training Days
monday_thursday.rationale: Fat adaptation for sustained energy, mitochondrial efficiency

friday_sunday.name: Shabbat/Rest Days
friday_sunday.rationale: Allows traditional Shabbat foods (challah, grape juice) while maintaining metabolic flexibility

options: 4 eggs scrambled in olive oil + avocado + kosher beef bacon
Grilled salmon + leafy greens + olive oil dressing

friday_dinner.note: Enjoy traditional foods in moderation. Focus on protein first.

saturday_lunch.note: Higher carb day - OK for metabolic flexibility

seudah_shlishit.note: Transition back to keto Sunday evening

competition_day.note: If competition is NOT on Shabbat

pre_race.food: Small carb load - banana, honey, dates

michael_andrew_comparison.applicability_to_shapira: Very high - same body type, same events, kosher adaptation works perfectly with weekly Shabbat carb cycle

kosher_specific_notes: All meat must be kosher certified
Separate meat and dairy (wait 6 hours after meat)
Many nuts, fish, and vegetables are naturally kosher
Fairlife Chocolate Milk is kosher (post-workout option)
Check all protein powders for kosher certification

israeli_ncaa_olympians.name: Martin Kartavi
israeli_ncaa_olympians.notes: Recruited specifically from Israel by Coach Gangloff

israeli_ncaa_olympians.name: Adam Maraana
israeli_ncaa_olympians.notes: Joined with Kartavi - UNC has active Israeli pipeline

israeli_ncaa_olympians.name: Ayla Spitz
israeli_ncaa_olympians.notes: Women's team - shows Northwestern values Israeli athletes

israeli_ncaa_olympians.name: Andrea Murez
israeli_ncaa_olympians.notes: Longest-serving Israeli NCAA swimmer - Stanford model

israeli_ncaa_olympians.name: Itay Goldfaden
israeli_ncaa_olympians.notes: Showed SEC teams recruit Israeli swimmers

tier_1_top_targets.name: University of Florida

swimming.coach_bio: Olympic gold 1988, USA Men's Olympic Head Coach 2024 Paris, 6x SEC Coach of Year

tier_1_top_targets.michael_fit: STRONG - Family #1 Goal, In-State, Bright Futures eligible

engineering.note: NO traditional engineering school - UNC focuses on liberal arts/sciences

chabad.address: 210 W Cameron Ave, Chapel Hill, NC 27516

tier_1_top_targets.michael_fit: EXCELLENT - Elite swimming + massive Jewish community

tier_3_florida_southeast_backups.michael_fit: SAFETY SCHOOL with guaranteed Orthodox support and family ties

swimming.coach_note: 2025 Team USA Head Coach, 10x ACC Coach of Year
swimming.achievements: 10 consecutive top-10 NCAA finishes, 9x ACC Champions

tier_3_florida_southeast_backups.michael_fit: TOP PICK - Elite swimming + excellent engineering + Chabad

tier_4_cold_but_excellent.name: University of Michigan
tier_4_cold_but_excellent.note: Best Jewish student life of any school
